name: Chocolate Almond Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine cream cheese, sugar, cocoa powder, and sour cream. Beat on medium speed until smooth.
3. Add eggs, vanilla extract, and almond extract. Mix well.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust (bottom only).
5. Bake for 10 minutes at 425°F.
6. Reduce temperature to 250°F and bake for an additional 55 minutes or until set. Remove from oven and let cool on a rack.
7. Loosen the cake from the pan with a knife, leaving the sides intact. Allow it to cool completely, several hours or overnight.
8. Garnish with whipped cream and almonds partially dipped in chocolate.
